name: @modelcontextprotocol/server-basic-react
description: Basic MCP App Server example using React

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && esbuild src/server/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --packages=external --outdir=dist && esbuild src/server/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/index.js --external:./server.js --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
